overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting two characters traveling a wilderness trail at night. One character walks while leading a horse, and the player character rides alongside, with a lantern illuminating the path through grassy hills and forest terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with scattered pines

events.description: horse stumbles slightly on uneven terrain but recovers

agents.ego_description: riding a horse and following a companion who is walking ahead with another horse

notable_agents.action: walking ahead leading a horse along the trail

entered.detail: tall rocky outcrop silhouetted against the moonlit sky ahead
tall pine trees scattered across the left hillside
tall pine trees on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit grassy trail with a large rock formation visible in the distance. The player rides a horse following an NPC companion who walks ahead leading another horse. Around 8 seconds, the horse stumbles slightly on the uneven dirt path. Sparse pine trees dot the hillsides under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed forest trail with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through the narrowing trail flanked by rocky outcrops and denser trees

notable_agents.action: walking steadily ahead leading the horse through the enclosed path

entered.detail: large rock wall lining the left side of the trail
rocky terrain and boulders on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as rocky outcrops appear on both sides, creating a narrower passage through the forest. The large rock formation from the previous segment passes behind as the pine trees draw closer to the path. The characters continue their steady progress along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail passing a wooden cabin

events.description: passing a wooden cabin on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding past a rustic wooden cabin and continuing along the forest path

notable_agents.action: walking past the cabin and continuing ahead on the trail

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with a dark roof situated beside the trail
wooden fence posts near the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The characters approach and pass a wooden cabin on the left side of the trail, marking a brief transition from pure wilderness to a settled area. After passing the cabin, the trail continues through dense forest as the rocky outcrops give way to more open woodland. The journey continues along the dirt path under the moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit wilderness trail that transitions from open grassy hills into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins on an uneven dirt path where a rider follows a companion leading a horse, passing sparse pine trees and a distant, large rock formation. As the camera progresses, the landscape narrows into a passage flanked by rocky outcrops, causing the surrounding pine trees to draw closer to the path. The scene then shifts as the characters pass a solitary wooden cabin on the left, marking a brief transition from the wild terrain to a settled area. Finally, the trail opens back into a stretch of dense woodland, continuing under the clear night sky as the rocky outcrops fade behind them.
